approved_scope: agent-call, agent-dispatch, role-queue, provider-activate, agent-switch, and provider-failover transport payloads
bounded task instructions, context refs, queue manifests, report paths, and provider evidence needed for the active task
disallowed_scope: secrets, credentials, auth tokens, or private keys
unbounded Vault, repository, home directory, or transcript dumps
personal data unrelated to the active organization task
persistent provider/model registry changes without separate human approval
external_context_transmission.host_safety_boundary: Repository policy cannot bypass Codex host-level sandbox, escalation, or external-provider safety review.

fast.description: Lightweight task record plus main-agent execution for very simple work.
allowed_when: single-step answer or small local edit
low risk and no publication gate
no sensitive permission, security, legal, or data-loss concern
user explicitly asks for speed or the task is obviously tiny

strict.description: Full organization workflow for normal and important work.
required_when: commit, push, PR, release, policy, permission, model, or hook change
security, legal, financial, medical, or high-impact decision
user explicitly asks for strict organization flow

maintenance.description: Use when changing the organization system itself.
maintenance.reason: Organization repair must not depend on the broken organization path.
